subject: [NBI] Use AAF init container for certificates
commit_message:
[NBI] Use AAF init container for certificates

Onboard server certificates for HTTPs via AAF init containers.

Issue-ID: EXTAPI-375
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: I4cb298b4c499e5a7d19d94080d241e4073a87a63
[Use common secret template for aaf credentials]
Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Opasiak <k.opasiak@samsung.com>
